Kyle Farnsworth

Position: Pitcher

Bats: Right  •  Throws: Right

6-4, 230lb (193cm, 104kg)

Born: April 14, 1976 in Wichita, KS us

Draft: Drafted by the Chicago Cubs in the 47th round of the 1994 MLB June Amateur Draft from Milton HS (Milton, GA).

High School: Milton HS (Milton, GA)

School: Abraham Baldwin Agricultural College (Tifton, GA)

Debut: April 29, 1999 (Age 23-015d, 17,441st in major league history)
   vs. FLA 6.0 IP, 6 H, 5 SO, 1 BB, 1 ER, W

Last Game: June 25, 2014 (Age 38-072d)
   vs. ATL 0.1 IP, 1 H, 0 SO, 0 BB, 1 ER

Rookie Status: Exceeded rookie limits during 1999 season

Agents: Barry Meister

Full Name: Kyle Lynn Farnsworth

Frequently Asked Questions

How old is Kyle Farnsworth?

Kyle Farnsworth is 49 years old.

When was Kyle Farnsworth born?

Kyle Farnsworth was born on April 14, 1976.

Where was Kyle Farnsworth born?

Kyle Farnsworth was born in Wichita, KS.

How tall is Kyle Farnsworth?

Kyle Farnsworth is 6-4 (193 cm) tall.

How much did Kyle Farnsworth weigh when playing?

Kyle Farnsworth weighed 230 lbs (104 kg) when playing.

How many seasons did Kyle Farnsworth play?

Kyle Farnsworth played 16 seasons.

Is Kyle Farnsworth in the Hall of Fame?

Kyle Farnsworth has not been elected into the Hall of Fame.

When was Kyle Farnsworth drafted?

Kyle Farnsworth was drafted by the Chicago Cubs in the 47th round of the 1994 MLB June Amateur Draft from Milton HS (Milton, GA).

What position did Kyle Farnsworth play?

Kyle Farnsworth was a Pitcher.

How many strikeouts did Kyle Farnsworth have?

Kyle Farnsworth had 963 strikeouts over his career.

How many teams has Kyle Farnsworth played for?

Kyle Farnsworth played for 9 teams; the Atlanta Braves, Chicago Cubs, Detroit Tigers, Houston Astros, Kansas City Royals, New York Mets, New York Yankees, Pittsburgh Pirates and Tampa Bay Rays.

When did Kyle Farnsworth retire?

Kyle Farnsworth last played in 2014.
